name: Assistant chat on mobile with the on-screen keyboard open
description: Mobile-first audit: composer, sidebar, send button, and streaming messages must all behave correctly when the on-screen keyboard takes half the viewport.

persona.name: Marcus Lee
persona.context: iPhone, Safari. Drafting a quote one-handed.

preconditions: User is on /assistant with at least one prior message

steps.expect: Keyboard slides up; composer remains pinned above the keyboard, not hidden behind it

steps.action: Types a long message that wraps to 4 lines
steps.expect: Composer auto-grows up to a max height, then scrolls internally; chat above remains scrollable
Message bubble appears immediately; streaming response scrolls into view automatically; user doesn't need to manually scroll
Layout returns to full height smoothly — no double scroll bars, no header glitching

evaluationCriteria.check: Send button is large enough to tap (≥44pt); contrast meets WCAG AA
Keyboard transitions don't cause layout jank or content shift
Streaming auto-scroll respects user scroll: if they manually scroll up to read older messages, auto-scroll pauses
Composer label is associated; viewport height accounts for visualViewport API on iOS
